name: Search Functionality – Basic Regression
description: 1. Launch browser. 2. Navigate to https://www.amazon.sg. 3. Wait for search input (name="field-keywords"). 4. Enter "headphones". 5. Press Enter. 6. Wait for search results to load. 7. Validate at least one result is displayed. 8. Close browser.
